data.title: Global Wellness Summit Announces Speakers and Topics--Including the Latest in Longevity Medicine, Women's Health, Wellness Travel and Neuroaesthetics
data.description: In November, wellness leaders will convene in Thailand to mark the 20th anniversary Summit, delving into the future of the industry valued at an estimated $6.8 trillion. This event comes at a pivotal moment for the sector. Thailand is set to host the global dialogue on wellness, emphasizing its significance.

data.title: ASUS Accelerates Enterprise AI at Scale with 6th-Gen AMD EPYC Server CPUs
data.description: ASUS unveils a new server lineup utilizing 6th-gen AMD EPYC Server CPUs for enhanced performance in enterprise AI, cloud services, virtualization, and critical business tasks. The announcement was made in San Francisco on July 24, 2026. This cutting-edge server series is driven by the AMD EPYC™ 9006 processor, offering scalability and efficiency for diverse computing needs.

data.title: Technological Breakthrough丨Niutech's Titanium-Iron Tailings Reduction and Enrichment Technology and Equipment Boost Global Strategic Mineral Resource Recovery
data.description: Niutech, a prominent player in industrial continuous pyrolysis technology based in LINYI, China, unveiled its latest advancement on July 24, 2026. The innovative "new-generation titanium-iron tailings reduction and enrichment technology and complete equipment" is designed to specifically address the needs of the industry. The technology showcases the company's commitment to advancement in this field.

data.title: Polymarket predicts 84% chance of no Fed cuts in 2026 after market turmoil. Oil rises amid Middle East tensions; Treasury yields and fed funds futures indicate higher odds of September hike.
data.description: Amid a sell-off in the U.S. stock market, oil prices surged due to escalating conflict in the Middle East. Treasury yields also rose, and the fed funds futures market indicated a higher likelihood of a September interest rate hike by the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Ant International’s Alipay+ Adds New Bank Partners Amid Cross-border Mobile Payment Boom in Asia Pacific
data.description: Alipay+, a service offered by Ant International in Singapore, enables banks to capitalize on cross-border payments for developing additional revenue channels and swiftly introducing value-added services into their offerings.

data.title: New tariffs of roughly 10% imposed on 80+ nations by Trump admin related to imports of goods made with forced labor. Previous tariff also 10%.
data.description: The government has implemented updated tariffs on imported goods manufactured using forced labor, supplanting a 10 percent tariff that lapsed.

data.title: Latest on Trade War: Trump reveals new global tariffs system following Supreme Court striking down original levies.
data.description: The president has introduced a complex strategy to continue his trade conflict after the Supreme Court invalidated his initial tariffs.

data.title: ZAPTEST Assessed “Awardable” for Department of War Work in the CDAO’s Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace
data.description: ZAPTEST revealed today that their ZADS - AI Digital Soldiers - has been deemed "Awardable" and is now accessible to approved government users via the Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace by the Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office. This platform provides Department of War mission entities and related professionals with access to competitively evaluated artificial intelligence, machine learning, digital, data, and analytics solutions.

data.title: Codexis Announces Pricing of Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Codexis, Inc., a renowned provider of enzymatic solutions for manufacturing complex oligonucleotide therapeutics, has disclosed the pricing details of its recent underwritten public offering. The offering consists of 16,666,667 shares of common stock priced at $1.50 per share. After factoring in underwriting discounts, commissions, and estimated expenses, Codexis anticipates netting roughly $23.1 million from this endeavor. The offering is slated to conclude around July 27, 2026, pending usual closing procedures. Additionally, Codexis has allowed the underwriters a 30-day option to procure up to an extra 2,500,000 shares of common stock at the public offering rate, minus underwriting reductions and commissions.
